texto: There is no relationship between brain size and intelligence. There is however a strong correlation between the size of the brain and the tendency to monthly episodes of irrational moodiness.

texto: When the evidence for and against "democracy being the finest system of government yet invented" is weighed, George W Bush is going to tip the scales very heavily against.

texto: Life's not always a bed of noses. "We've been put on this earth to do good, and as long as you can put you hand on yer heart and say you've done yer best you can gan to yer rest with an easy conscience," was what me granny used to say. Before they dragged her off to the funny farm dressed as a Christmas turkey (it were the stuffing that gave the game away).
explicacao: Citação de Andre the BFG sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Life's not always a bed of noses. "We've been put on this earth to do good, and as long as you ca…” articula amor, christmas, conscience em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como natal e conscience.

frase_original: Life's not always a bed of noses. "We've been put on this earth to do good, and as long as you can put you hand on yer heart and say you've done yer best you can gan to yer rest with an easy conscience," was what me granny used to say. Before they dragged her off to the funny farm dressed as a Christmas turkey (it were the stuffing that gave the game away).

texto: Think about it. When you reach 18 you're no longer an underage drinker. This means that drinking is no longer an act of rebellion, and so there's no point in doing it any more. You've got to find some other way of looking hard in front of your friends, like attaching weights to your testicles and swimming naked through the snapping turtle pond at the zoo
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Andre the BFG: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Think about it. When you reach 18 you're no longer an underage drinker. This means that drinking …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, drinking, machismo pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e machismo.

frase_original: Think about it. When you reach 18 you're no longer an underage drinker. This means that drinking is no longer an act of rebellion, and so there's no point in doing it any more. You've got to find some other way of looking hard in front of your friends, like attaching weights to your testicles and swimming naked through the snapping turtle pond at the zoo
